headline: Ventas Q1 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates on Strong SHOP Results
summary: VTR posts Q1 FFO and revenue growth as senior housing demand lifted SHOP results, prompting higher 2026 guidance and a bigger investment plan.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Prologis, Raises Price Target to $148
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Michael Carroll   maintains Prologis (NYSE:PLD) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $135 to $148.
